docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,190.00 FILED BY BOERI, KETTY AS TO DEFENDANT BELL, KRYSTAL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-17-1995 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT C
